creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Found an issue during package building in tinderbox. 
Can you check? 

tail of build log: 
<http://lorie.secnap.net/tb/index.php?action=display_markup_log&build=7-scheidell_I386&id=1799#587> 

pkg_add squeak-4.4.7.tbz 

------------------------- Please note: ------------------------- 

In order to be able to make use of squeak you need to have an 
image and a changes file in your working directory as well 
as access to a source file. This is easy by using inisqueak. 
Please see the inisqueak(1) manpage for details. 

Make sure you have the following values in your environment 
variables: 
PATH:            /usr/local/bin 
LD_LIBRARY_PATH: /usr/local/lib 
/usr/local/lib/squeak/4.4.7-2375 

------------------ Thanks for your attention! ------------------ 

===>  Installing for ja-seaside-070930.s38_1 
===>   ja-seaside-070930.s38_1 depends on executable: squeak - found 
===>   Generating temporary packing list 
===>  Checking if japanese/seaside already installed 
(cd /work/a/ports/japanese/seaside/work && install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 Seaside-JPatched20070930-sq38.image.gz  
/usr/local/share/squeak/) 
install: /usr/local/share/squeak/: No such file or directory 
*** Error code 71
